nasb.text: But the hand of Ahikam the son of Shaphan was with Jeremiah, so that he was not given into the hands of the people to put him to death.

esv.text: But the hand of Ahikam the son of Shaphan was with Jeremiah so that he was not given over to the people to be put to death.

cnv.text: 然而沙番的兒子亞希甘卻保護耶利米，不許人把耶利米交在人民的手中處死。

ccb.text: 然而，沙番的儿子亚希甘保护耶利米，他才没被交给民众处死。
